---
title: "About | Matthew Burns"
image: images/Matthew-Burns-headshot.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthewsburns849/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/msburns24/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact me
      href: mailto:msb@ameritech.net
---

*Analytical problem-solver bridging supply chain, data science, and software
development, leveraging machine learning and deep learning to build
innovative, data-driven solutions.*

# Background

I started my career with a background in mechanical engineering before
transitioning into supply chain analytics, where I discovered my passion for
using data to solve complex problems in the organization. Over time, I realized
I was most excited by the data science and modeling approaches, trying to
understand the concepts at a deeper level. That led me to enroll in a Master in
Applied Data Science program, where I've been expanding my knowledge with dat
scientists who work with some real cutting-edge approaches. Today, I'm finding
ways to apply those tools toward high-impact problems: ones that require robust
solutions and creative approaches.
